temporal_description:
(00:00-00:05) At night, a black Mercedes-Benz sedan is parked with its headlights on, casting a bright glare. A man in a blue shirt and jeans gets out of the driver's side, followed by another man in a beige coat and a patterned shirt. The man in the beige coat smiles as he exits the vehicle. The car's windshield is covered in small, colorful stickers. (Storyline: This opening shot introduces two characters arriving at a location in a luxury car, setting a slightly mysterious and upscale tone.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous musical score begins to play, building tension.)
(00:06-00:09) The man in the beige coat closes his car door with a solid thud. The man in the blue shirt stands beside the car, looking towards the building. The car's headlights continue to illuminate the front of the vehicle. (Storyline: The characters have now fully exited the car, preparing to enter the building, which is presumably their destination.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous music continues, and the sound of the car door closing is sharp and distinct.)
